data.title: Jito Foundation Announces Updates to JTO Token Economics
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Jito Foundation has announced four significant updates to the JTO token economics. The foundation has completed its first round of JTO buybacks, totaling $1 million, executed in four transactions over ten days. The organization plans to continue using the TWAP buyback strategy and is exploring additional mechanisms, such as an auction system, to facilitate automatic value accumulation for JTO.

Additionally, the JIP-24 proposal has been approved, resulting in a doubling of the DAO block engine fees. The foundation has also launched the JTO Economic Hub page and held its first conference call for JTO holders.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Faces Charges Over National Guard Deployment
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump has been indicted for deploying National Guard troops in Washington, D.C. The charges stem from actions taken during his presidency, raising legal questions about the use of military forces in domestic affairs. This development adds to the ongoing legal challenges faced by Trump, who has been involved in various controversies during his time in office. The case highlights the complexities of presidential authority and its implications for national security and civil liberties.

data.title: Over $45 million in liquidation occurred across the network in the past hour, primarily due to long positions.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of US$45.0047 million, of which long positions had a liquidation of US$42.5519 million and short positions had a liquidation of US$2.4528 million.

data.title: Building Blocks: Token claims will be open at TGE, and BARD public sale settlement and refunds have been initiated
data.description: Buildingpad announced on the X platform that the settlement and refund process for the public sale of BARD, the Bitcoin DeFi protocol Lombard's token, has officially begun. To ensure the security of all user funds, withdrawals will be available in phases. Token claims will be available at Lombard's TGE.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List OpenLedger (OPEN) on September 8th
data.description: Binance Alpha will list OpenLedger (OPEN) on September 8th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Alpha Points after trading opens. More details will be announced soon.

data.title: BTC falls below 110,000 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has fallen below 110,000 USDT, currently trading at 109,997.9 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 1.53%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: Strategy's Potential Inclusion in S&P 500 Sparks Interest
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Strategy is being considered as a potential addition to the S&P 500 index. Bloomberg reports that the company's unrealized gains of $14 billion last quarter theoretically meet the profitability criteria required for inclusion.

Stephens Inc. analysts suggest that if Strategy is approved, passive funds tracking the index would need to purchase nearly 50 million shares, valued at approximately $16 billion at current prices.

Beyond profitability, the S&P committee will evaluate factors such as liquidity, profitability, and trading history, while also considering industry balance. To be included, companies must be highly liquid U.S. firms with a market capitalization of at least $22.7 billion and must have reported positive earnings in the most recent quarter and over the past four quarters.

data.title: Musk's X Money plan is hampered by regulators and employee turnover
data.description: Elon Musk's X Money initiative has been hampered by regulatory obstacles and employee turnover. One of Musk's biggest ambitions is to disrupt and replace traditional banks and payment processors with technology. Meanwhile, one of his management philosophies is to push employees to develop products as quickly and cost-effectively as possible. Within X, these two ideals are clashing. Musk's desire to quickly launch a nationwide payments service has led to regulatory hurdles, sparking a wave of senior employee departures.

data.title: Circle: Native USDC and CCTP V2 Coming Soon to Plume
data.description: According to official news, Circle announced that native USDC and CCTP V 2 will soon be listed on Plume.

data.title: Stuttgart Stock Exchange launches blockchain settlement platform Seturion
data.description: The Stuttgart Stock Exchange announced the launch of Seturion, a blockchain-based digital settlement platform designed to streamline post-trade processes for tokenized assets across Europe, eliminate cross-border friction, unify fragmented settlement systems, and reduce costs by 90%. The platform is currently in use on BX Digital, a distributed ledger technology (DLT) trading platform regulated by the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA). (CoinDesk)

data.title: Wyoming, USA, will list the stablecoin FRNT on Hedera
data.description: The Wyoming Stable Token Commission (WYST) announced the upcoming listing of its state-issued stablecoin, Frontier Stable Token (FRNT), on the trusted public network Hedera. Created under the Wyoming Stable Token Act of 2023, FRNT is the first state-issued stablecoin in the United States and is fully backed by U.S. dollars and short-term U.S. Treasury bonds, with an additional 2% reserve for stability.

data.title: Data: Over 61% of MKR has been converted to SKY
data.description: Sky (formerly MakerDAO) has disclosed that over 61% of MKR tokens have been converted to SKY. A governance proposal will be issued on September 18th to determine the penalty for delayed conversions of MKR to SKY. If approved, the penalty will take effect on September 22nd.

data.title: The total number of Mystonks users exceeded 40,000, setting a new record high
data.description: According to the official website of MyStonks, a decentralized US stock token trading platform, the platform's total user base has exceeded 40,000, a record high. The platform has also listed 182 RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA. Total trading volume has also exceeded $1.35 billion, also setting a new record. MyStonks has obtained a Money Services Business (MSB) license from the US Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) and has completed filing for a Security Token Offering (STO) with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

data.title: The US Department of Justice has launched a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook.
data.description: According to the Wall Street Journal, the U.S. Department of Justice has launched a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Board Governor Lisa Cook and issued a subpoena to investigate whether she submitted false information in her mortgage application.

data.title: The final value of the US S&P Global Services PMI in August was 54.5, which was expected to be 55.4
data.description: The final S&P Global Services PMI for August in the United States was 54.5, compared to expectations of 55.4 and the previous reading of 55.4. The final S&P Global Composite PMI for August in the United States was 54.6, compared to expectations of 55.3 and the previous reading of 55.4. (Golden Ten)

data.title: MAIGA Completes US$2 Million in Strategic Financing, with Amber Group and Others Joining
data.description: AI agent platform MAIGA announced that it has secured $2 million in strategic funding from investors including Amber Group, Red Beard Ventures, IBC Group, TBV Ventures, and Chainlink. The company is reportedly building AI agents for DeFi and cryptocurrency using MCP, TEE, and Multimodal technologies, and is deploying an AI agent launchpad on the BNB chain. (The Block)

data.title: American Bitcoin's early losses widened to 10%.
data.description: U.S. stock market data shows that after American Bitcoin, a U.S. Bitcoin mining company associated with the Trump family, jumped 16.5% on its first day of listing on the Nasdaq, its early trading losses widened to 10%.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks fell across the board at the opening of the US stock market, with ALT5 falling 14.7%
data.description: When the U.S. stock market opened, the Dow Jones Industrial Average opened nearly flat, the S&P 500 rose 0.1%, the Nasdaq rose 0.1%, the crypto sector fell across the board, and the ALT 5 fell 14.7%.

data.title: Kraken Announces Acquisition of Crypto-Native Proprietary Trading Platform Breakout
data.description: According to official news, cryptocurrency exchange Kraken announced the acquisition of Breakout, a crypto-native proprietary trading platform founded by TraderMayne and CryptoCred, for an undisclosed amount.

data.title: Ethereum’s monthly spot volume tops bitcoin trading on centralized exchanges for first time in over 7 years
data.description:
Ether’s monthly spot volume on CEXs overtook bitcoin’s for the first time in years amid institutional demand, The Block’s data shows.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/369477/ethereums-monthly-spot-volume-tops-bitcoin-trading-on-centralized-exchanges-for-first-time-in-over-7-years?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
